form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: To constitute the minority party's membership on certain committees for the One Hundred Twelfth Congress, or until their successors are chosen.

section.text: That the following shall constitute the minority party's membership on the following committees for the One Hundred Twelfth Congress, or until their successors are chosen:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Roberts, Mr. Lugar, Mr. Cochran, Mr. McConnell, Mr. Chambliss, Mr. Johanns, Mr. Boozman, Mr. Grassley, Mr. Thune, and Mr. Hoeven.
Mr. Cochran, Mr. McConnell, Mr. Shelby, Mrs. Hutchison, Mr. Alexander, Ms. Collins, Ms. Murkowski, Mr. Graham, Mr. Kirk, Mr. Coats, Mr. Blunt, Mr. Moran, Mr. Hoeven, and Mr. Johnson (Wisconsin).
Mr. McCain, Mr. Inhofe, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Chambliss, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Brown (Massachusetts), Mr. Portman, Ms. Ayotte, Ms. Collins, Mr. Graham, Mr. Cornyn, and Mr. Vitter.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Shelby, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Corker, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Johanns, Mr. Toomey, Mr. Kirk, Mr. Moran, and Mr. Wicker.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mrs. Hutchison, Ms. Snowe, Mr. Ensign, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Thune, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Blunt, Mr. Boozman, Mr. Toomey, Mr. Rubio, and Ms. Ayotte.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Murkowski, Mr. Burr, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Risch, Mr. Lee, Mr. Paul, Mr. Coats, Mr. Portman, Mr. Hoeven, and Mr. Corker.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on the Environment and Public Works:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Inhofe, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Barrasso, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Alexander, Mr. Johanns, and Mr. Boozman.
Mr. Hatch, Mr. Grassley, Ms. Snowe, Mr. Kyl, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Roberts, Mr. Ensign, Mr. Enzi, Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Coburn, and Mr. Thune.
Mr. Lugar, Mr. Corker, Mr. Risch, Mr. Rubio, Mr. Inhofe, Mr. DeMint, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Barrasso, and Mr. Lee.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Enzi, Mr. Alexander, Mr. Burr, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Paul, Mr. Hatch, Mr. McCain, Mr. Roberts, Ms. Murkowski, and Mr. Kirk.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Collins, Mr. Coburn, Mr. Brown (Massachusetts), Mr. McCain, Mr. Johnson (Wisconsin), Mr. Ensign, Mr. Portman, and Mr. Paul.
Mr. Grassley, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Kyl, Mr. Sessions, Mr. Graham, Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Lee, and Mr. Coburn.
Mr. Sessions, Mr. Grassley, Mr. Enzi, Mr. Crapo, Mr. Ensign, Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Graham, Mr. Thune, Mr. Portman, Mr. Toomey, and Mr. Johnson (Wisconsin).
Mr. Alexander, Mr. McConnell, Mr. Cochran, Mr. Chambliss, Mrs. Hutchison, Mr. Roberts, Mr. Shelby, and Mr. Blunt.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Snowe, Mr. Vitter, Mr. Risch, Mr. Rubio, Mr. Paul, Ms. Ayotte, Mr. Enzi, Mr. Brown (Massachusetts), and Mr. Moran.
Mr. Burr, Mr. Isakson, Mr. Wicker, Mr. Johanns, Mr. Brown (Massachusetts), Mr. Moran, and Mr. Boozman.
Mr. Corker, Ms. Collins, Mr. Hatch, Mr. Kirk, Mr. Moran, Mr. Johnson (Wisconsin), Ms. Ayotte, Mr. Shelby, Mr. Graham, and Mr. Chambliss.
Mr. Chambliss, Ms. Snowe, Mr. Burr, Mr. Risch, Mr. Coats, Mr. Blunt, and Mr. Rubio.
Mr. DeMint, Mr. Coats, Mr. Lee, and Mr. Toomey.
Mr. Isakson, Mr. Roberts, and Mr. Risch.
Mr. Barrasso, Mr. McCain, Ms. Murkowski, Mr. Hoeven, Mr. Crapo, and Mr. Johanns.
